SOURCE: 52246737.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (52246737.pdf)
SUMMARY: Process driven, goal oriented Information Security Leader with 5 years of IT and security experience. Adept at analyzing and remediating threat vectors on an enterprise level, enhancing daily security operations, leading a geographically diverse team, and implementing SOX governance & compliance.
SKILLS: Active Directory, Anti-Virus, Business Process, Compliance Manager, Firewall, IDS/IPS, Information Security, Linux, Mac, Microsoft Exchange, Network Security, Proxy, Risk Management, Security Technologies, TCP/IP

JOB TITLE: Information Technology Provisioning Technician

JOB TITLE: Information Technology Consultant

SOURCE: 52246737.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Security & Compliance Manager
COMPANY: SolarCity, SAN MATEO, CA
DATES: November 2013 - PRESENT
DESCRIPTION: Managed enterprise security initiatives. Implemented forensic imaging solutions and managed SOX compliance programs.
